description: Example seeds for `signlang translate --seed ...`. Each seed deterministically generates a signed sentence (pose-keypoint trajectories) with the gold glosses/text below.

examples.note: in-vocabulary signed sentence -> recognized glosses + spoken text

abstain_behaviour: A pose sequence with no clear signs (random/low-motion) or heavy keypoint noise drives the per-sign confidence below threshold; when the low-confidence-segment ratio exceeds 0.5 the agent ABSTAINS ('uncertain' + needs_review) rather than emit an unreliable translation.
vocabulary_note: The 40-gloss vocabulary + gloss->text lexicon is in src/signlang/data/lexicon.py; GET /vocabulary returns it from the running API.
